response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior individual contributor with genuine open-source depth (founder of GISCollective, D-language libraries, FOSS4G speaker) and broad experience spanning web, embedded, and low-latency systems, which aligns well with the open-source and Linux orientation of the role. However, this is an executive leadership position requiring a proven track record in software-development leadership and team management, and his career shows no formal lead, architect, or management roles. Most critically, the position requires minimum C1 German for client-facing consulting work, while his resume lists German as basic — a hard disqualifier. UML, requirements management, and security/compliance expertise are also not evidenced.
strengths: Deep, sustained open-source engagement: founder of an open-source geo-data platform, author of several D-language libraries, conference speaker
Broad technical range across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency backend systems, with strong Linux exposure
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through multi-day courses, workshops, and coding dojos
concerns: German listed as basic, far below the required C1 minimum for a client-facing consulting role in Germany
No formal team-leadership, head-of-development, or technical project management roles in nearly 20 years of experience
No evidence of UML/modeling practice, requirements management, or IT security, risk, and compliance expertise

key_factors.factor: Missing leadership and management track record
